channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Adjuvanted and high-dose flu vaccines show comparable effectiveness in adults
item.description: 1. Adjuvanted influenza vaccines did not differ significantly in effectiveness compared to high-dose influenza vaccines against laboratory-confirmed i...

item.title: FDA official who reviewed COVID shots and antidepressants departs in latest shake-up
item.description: A Food and Drug Administration official involved in scrutinizing the safety of antidepressants, COVID-19 vaccines and other widely used therapies has ...

item.title: Japanese drugmaker warns against rare disease drug after patient deaths
item.description: A Japanese pharmaceutical firm has warned doctors against prescribing a drug for rare autoimmune diseases to new patients following the deaths of 20 p...

item.title: The yips: When 'choking' in sports goes to the next level
item.description: Legendary 18-time major winner Jack Nicklaus once stated golf was "90% mental and 10% physical." That's because, unlike most other ball sports, a golf...
